account_created: Account created. Please check your email to confirm your address.
account_deletion_requested_follow_instru: Account deletion requested. Please follow the instructions we sent to your email.
after_activation_description: Only upload media captured after camera upload was first activated.
are_you_sure_delete_note: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this note? This cannot be undone.
are_you_sure_delete_selected_notes: Are you sure you want to permanently delete the selected notes? This cannot be undone.
are_you_sure_delete_selected_permanently: Are you sure you want to permanently delete the selected items? This cannot be undone.
are_you_sure_delete_tag: Are you sure you want to delete this tag? It will be removed from all notes.
are_you_sure_disable_public_link_selecte: Are you sure you want to disable the public link for the selected items?
are_you_sure_empty_trash: Are you sure you want to permanently delete everything in the trash? This cannot be undone.
are_you_sure_leave_note: Are you sure you want to leave this note?
are_you_sure_leave_selected_notes: Are you sure you want to leave the selected notes?
are_you_sure_remove_selected_from_playli: Are you sure you want to remove the selected tracks from this playlist?
are_you_sure_remove_share_selected: Are you sure you want to remove the selected items from Shared with me?
are_you_sure_restore_note: Are you sure you want to restore the note to this version?
are_you_sure_restore_selected: Are you sure you want to restore the selected items?
are_you_sure_stop_sharing_selected: Are you sure you want to stop sharing the selected items?
are_you_sure_trash_note: Are you sure you want to move this note to the trash? You can restore it later.
are_you_sure_trash_selected: Are you sure you want to move the selected items to the trash? You can restore them later.
are_you_sure_trash_selected_notes: Are you sure you want to move the selected notes to the trash? You can restore them later.
are_you_sure_trash_selected_photos: Are you sure you want to move the selected items to the trash? You can restore them later.
avatar_unsupported_format: This image format is not supported. Please choose a different image.
avatar_upload_failed: Could not update your avatar. Please try again.
background_description: Continue syncing when the app is in the background. Only photos are uploaded in the background.
background_transfers_description: Keep uploads and downloads running while the app is in the background. Shows a persistent notification while transfers are active.
background_transfers_notifications_disab: Notifications are off, so background transfers won't run. Tap to open settings.
background_transfers_notifications_requi: Allow notifications to run transfers in the background.
bad_recovery_key: The recovery key is invalid. Please double-check it and try again.
biometric_authentication_description: Unlock the app with Face ID, Touch ID, or your device PIN
biometric_disables_file_provider_message: Enabling biometric authentication will disable the file provider, because the provider bypasses the lock screen. Do you want to continue?
biometric_not_supported: Biometric authentication is not supported on this device or no biometric method is enrolled.
block_contact_confirmation: Are you sure you want to block this contact?
block_selected_contacts_confirmation: Are you sure you want to block the selected contacts?
cache_size_description: Maximum disk space used to cache downloaded files
camera_upload_album_listing_failed: Could not read the album {{album}}. Its items were skipped during this sync.
camera_upload_asset_filename_missing: This item has no file name in the device media store and was skipped.
camera_upload_destination_unavailable_de: The cloud directory for camera upload was deleted or moved to the trash. Choose a new directory to continue syncing.
camera_upload_disabled_description: Enable camera upload to automatically sync your photos and videos.
camera_upload_file_missing: This item could no longer be found on your device.
camera_upload_processing_failed: This item could not be prepared for upload.
camera_upload_remote_listing_incomplete: Some remote directories could not be listed. Backup continued, but items may be uploaded again.
camera_upload_skipped_asset_description: Upload failed repeatedly. Tap retry to try again.
cancel_contact_confirmation: Are you sure you want to cancel this contact request?
cancel_request_contact_confirmation: Are you sure you want to cancel this contact request?
cancel_selected_outgoing_confirmation: Are you sure you want to cancel the selected contact requests?
cannot_decrypt_body: This item could not be decrypted. It may have been created with a different account or key.
cellular_description: Allow uploads over mobile data. This can use a lot of data.
chat_message_not_saved_to_device: Your message could not be saved on this device. Keep the app open until it has been sent.
chunk_too_large: A part of the file is too large to upload.
clean_temporary_files_confirmation: This removes leftover staging files and partial downloads from interrupted sessions. Nothing stored in the cloud is affected.
clean_temporary_files_description: Removes leftover staging files and partial downloads from interrupted sessions
clean_temporary_files_unavailable: Not available while transfers or syncs are running
clear_all_disk_caches_confirmation: This clears all disk caches. Cached data will be regenerated or re-downloaded as needed.
clear_all_disk_caches_description: Clears thumbnails, previews, music metadata, and the temporary cache
clear_image_thumbnails_description: This clears all cached image thumbnails. They will be regenerated as needed.
clear_music_metadata_description: This clears all cached music metadata and cover art. It will be re-fetched as needed.
clear_offline_files_confirmation: This removes all files saved for offline access from this device. They remain available in the cloud.
clear_preview_cache_description: This clears all cached file previews. They will be re-downloaded as needed.
clear_sandbox_cache_description: This clears temporary files stored in the app cache.
compress_description: Compress photos before uploading to save storage. This slightly reduces photo quality.
confirm_cancel_all_transfers: Are you sure you want to cancel all transfers?
confirm_cancel_transfer: Are you sure you want to cancel this transfer?
confirm_delete_permanently: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this item? This cannot be undone.
confirm_disable_public_link: Are you sure you want to disable the public link for this item?
confirm_remove_offline: Are you sure you want to remove this item from offline storage?
confirm_remove_offline_selected: Are you sure you want to remove the selected items from offline storage?
confirm_remove_share: Are you sure you want to remove this share?
confirm_stop_sharing: Are you sure you want to stop sharing this item?
confirm_trash: Are you sure you want to move this item to the trash? You can restore it later.
conversion_error: Something went wrong while processing your data.
convert_heic_to_jpg_description: Automatically convert HEIC/HEIF photos to JPG on upload for better compatibility across devices and apps.
delete_all_chats_confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete all selected chats? This cannot be undone.
delete_all_files_and_directories_descrip: Are you sure you want to delete all of your files and directories?
This permanently deletes all of your files and directories. This cannot be undone.
delete_all_tags_confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete the selected tags? They will be removed from all notes.
delete_all_versions_confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete all versions of this file?
delete_chat_confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this chat? This cannot be undone.
delete_message_confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this message?
delete_playlist_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this playlist?
delete_selected_playlists_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete the selected playlists?
delete_selected_versions_confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete the selected versions?
delete_version_confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this version?
delete_versioned_files_description_are_y: Are you sure you want to delete all versioned files?
delete_versioned_files_description_non_r: This permanently deletes all previous versions of your files. This cannot be undone.
deny_contact_confirmation: Are you sure you want to deny this contact request?
deny_request_contact_confirmation: Are you sure you want to deny this contact request?
deny_selected_requests_confirmation: Are you sure you want to deny the selected contact requests?
disable_two_factor_authentication_descri: Are you sure you want to disable two-factor authentication? Your account will be less secure.
documents_provider_description: Access your Filen files directly from the system document picker. Files are streamed on demand and cached locally.
download_limit_description: Cap how fast files download to save data or battery
download_partial_failure: {{failed}} of {{total}} files could not be saved to Downloads

enter_two_factor_code_or_recovery_key: Enter your two-factor code or recovery key
error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
error_resolving_shares: Could not resolve the shared files
error_resolving_shares_description: Please go back and try sharing again.
export_logs_consent: Logs may contain file and folder names, paths, and other personal information — but never your password or encryption keys. Only share them with people you trust, such as Filen support.
export_logs_description: Save app diagnostic logs to share with Filen support.
export_logs_none: There are no logs to export yet.
export_master_keys_description: Back up your master keys for account recovery
export_master_keys_needed_for_recovery: Your master keys are required to recover your account if you forget your password. Export and store them somewhere safe.
feature_requires_subscription_public_lin: Upgrade your account to share items with public links
file_changed_during_sync: The file changed while it was being synced. Please try again.
file_provider_description: Access your Filen files directly from the Files app. Files are streamed on demand and cached locally.
file_provider_disables_biometric_message: The provider lets the system access your files directly, bypassing the in-app biometric lock. Enabling it will turn off biometric lock. Do you want to continue?
file_provider_disables_biometric_title: Biometric lock will be turned off
file_versioning_description: Keep previous versions of changed files
folder_is_empty_description: Upload files or create a directory to fill it.
fs_directory_walk_error: Could not read the contents of a directory on your device.
fs_io_error: Could not read or write a file on your device.
gdpr_information_description: Export the personal data we hold about you
haptic_feedback_description: Play a subtle vibration when you tap buttons and controls.
heif_error: This HEIF image could not be processed.
image_error: This image could not be processed.
import_partial_download_one: Import cancelled: {{count}} file could not be downloaded
import_partial_download_other: Import cancelled: {{count}} files could not be downloaded
import_partial_upload_one: Import incomplete: {{count}} file could not be uploaded
import_partial_upload_other: Import incomplete: {{count}} files could not be uploaded

invalid_name: That name is not allowed. Please choose a different one.
invalid_pdf: This PDF could not be opened
invalid_state: This action cannot be completed right now. Please try again.

language_description: Choose the language used throughout the app

leave_chat_confirmation: Are you sure you want to leave this chat?
lock_app_after_description: Choose when to lock the app after inactivity
login_alerts_description: Get notified by email about new logins to your account
logout_confirm_wipes_local_data: Logging out will wipe all locally stored data from this device. Are you sure you want to log out?
low_battery_description: Pause syncing when the battery is low.
master_keys_reminder_message: Your master keys are the only way to recover your data if you forget your password. Export and store them somewhere safe.
max_remote_storage_reached: You've reached your storage limit. Free up space or upgrade your plan.
metadata_was_not_decrypted: Some data could not be decrypted.
name: Name
network_error: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
network_retry_failed: The request failed repeatedly. Please check your connection and try again.
no_camera_upload_errors_description: All your photos and videos have backed up successfully.
no_chats_description: Start a conversation with one of your contacts.
no_contacts_description: Add a contact to start sharing and chatting.
no_events_description: Your account activity will appear here.
no_favorites_description: Items you mark as favorites will appear here.
no_file_versions_description: Older versions of this file will appear here as you change it.
no_links_description: Public links you create will appear here.

no_offline_items_description: Files you make available offline will appear here.
no_offline_sync_errors_description: All your offline files are up to date.
no_permissions_enable_manually: Permission denied. Please enable it manually in your device settings.
no_photos_description: Photos and videos you back up will appear here.
no_playlists_description: Create a playlist to organize your music.
no_recents_description: Files you open will appear here.
no_resolved_shares_description: This should only take a moment.
no_shared_in_items_description: Items others share with you will appear here.
no_shared_out_items_description: Items you share will appear here.
no_tags_description: Create tags to organize your notes.
no_tracks_description: Add tracks to this playlist to start listening.
no_transfers_description: Your uploads and downloads will appear here.
note_edit_not_saved_to_device: Your edit could not be saved on this device. Keep the app open until it has synced.
note_edited_message: This note was edited by someone else. Reload to see the latest changes? Any unsynced local edits will be lost.
note_overwrote_newer_remote_changes: "{{name}}" had newer changes — the previous version is in the note's history
offline_location_unavailable: Couldn't determine the location of a selected item. Open its directory once, then try again.
open_web_app_to_change_more_settings_do_: Open the Filen web app to change more settings. Do you want to open it?
password_reset_email_sent: If an account exists for that address, a password reset email has been sent.
password_too_weak_to_register: Choose a stronger password to continue
personal_information_description: Manage your name, address and tax details
picture_in_picture_description: Keep videos playing in a floating window when you leave the app. While a video is floating, returning to the app will not ask you to unlock again.
pin_only_description: Use only your passcode instead of biometrics to unlock
please_check_connection: Please check your connection and try again.
please_enter_valid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
privacy_screen_description: Hide the app's contents in the app switcher when you leave the app
public_link_description: Create a link to share this item with anyone
public_link_generate_failed: Could not create the public link. Please try again.
register_free_storage_eligible: You are eligible for 10 GiB of free storage!
register_free_storage_not_eligible: You are not eligible for 10 GiB of free storage.
register_subtitle: Sign up for a free Filen account
remember_sort_per_directory_description: Keep a separate sort order for every directory instead of one global order
remember_view_per_directory_description: Keep a separate view layout for every directory instead of one global layout

resend_confirmation_email_sent: If an account exists for that address, a confirmation email has been sent.
reset_sort_confirm: Are you sure you want to reset all saved sort orders?
reset_sort_description: Clear all saved sort orders and return to the defaults
reset_view_confirm: Are you sure you want to reset all saved view modes?
reset_view_description: Clear all saved view modes and return to the default list view
restore_history_confirmation: Are you sure you want to restore the note to this version?
restore_version_confirmation: Are you sure you want to restore this version?
reupload_deleted_description: Mirror your library: items removed from the cloud directory are uploaded again on the next sync. When off, deleted items stay deleted.
search_results_truncated: Showing the first {{shown}} of {{total}} matches (alphabetical). Refine your search to narrow it down.
search_unavailable_description: Couldn't search right now. Pull to refresh or try again later.
server_error: The server returned an error. Please try again later.
setup_failed_description: Something went wrong while starting the app. Please try again.
sharing_not_available: Sharing is not available on this device.
start_screen_description: Choose the screen shown when the app opens
storage_exceeded_message: You've reached your storage limit. Delete some files or upgrade your plan to keep uploading.
sync_offline_in_background_description: Periodically sync your offline files while the app is in the background. Large directories are skipped and sync when you open the app, to save battery and data.
sync_offline_on_wifi_only_description: Only sync your offline files when connected to Wi-Fi.
theme_description: Choose a light or dark appearance, or follow the system
too_many_failed_attempts: Too many failed attempts. Please try again shortly.
transfer_performance_description: How aggressively transfers run — higher uses more battery, memory and data
transfer_performance_restart_required: This change will take effect the next time you restart the app.
trash_is_empty_description: Items you move to the trash will appear here.
two_factor_authentication_description: Require a code from your authenticator app at login
two_factor_recovery_key_save_description: This is the only time your recovery key will be shown. Copy it and store it somewhere safe — you will need it if you ever lose access to your authenticator app, and it cannot be retrieved again.
two_factor_recovery_key_saved_confirm: I have saved my recovery key
two_factor_recovery_key_unavailable: Your recovery key is no longer available
two_factor_recovery_key_unavailable_desc: It can only be viewed once, right after you enable two-factor authentication.
unauthenticated: You're not logged in. Please log in again.
unavailable_offline: This file is not available offline
unblock_contact_confirmation: Are you sure you want to unblock this contact?
unblock_selected_confirmation: Are you sure you want to unblock the selected contacts?
unsaved_changes_message: You have unsaved changes to this file. Save them before leaving?
upload_limit_description: Cap how fast files upload to save data or battery
view_logs_description: See the diagnostic logs you can export, newest first.
